title: Statistical Harmonization and Comparable-Series Engine
capabilities: Explicit unit conversion with dimensional checks
Per-capita and population-normalized transformations with supplied denominators
Reporting-period alignment with explicit sum, mean, or latest aggregation
Currency conversion using supplied, cited period-specific rates
Constant-price adjustment using supplied deflators and declared base years
Index rebasing with a visible base period
Raw-versus-transformed views and reproducible transformation lineage
Comparable-series diagnostics and Workbench handoff packets
boundaries: No silent normalization, unit conversion, inflation adjustment, or missing-value imputation.
No proprietary country ranking or composite score is created.
Currency and price transformations require explicit rates, deflators, sources, and price-basis metadata.
Geographic similarity does not establish identical statistical coverage or methodology.
Transformation receipts support research and review; they do not certify official statistical equivalence.
